creator: crahman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 182461
patch-keyblank.ps and patch-keyprint for the security/keyprint port

security/keyprint only supports S/Key, not OPIE

Since the opieprint port has been removed, and since the S/Key utilities are no longer included with FreeBSD, it makes sense to patch this port to make it functional once again - and there is nothing gained by leaving it unusable.

I have attached two simple patch files that accomplish this:
patch-keyblank.ps
patch-keyprint

RE: Bugs 32936 and 71089
